final_prompt.prompt:
Use case: illustration
Asset type: children's picture book illustration, full-page spread
Primary request: a whimsical forest concert scene with adorable animals playing music
Scene/backdrop: enchanted forest clearing with fairy-tale mushroom houses, rainbow arching across the sky, lush green grass and wildflowers
Subject: cute anthropomorphic animals — a rabbit playing cello, a squirrel playing flute, gathered together for a woodland concert
Style/medium: children's book illustration, whimsical storybook art, soft watercolor with digital painting, rounded friendly shapes
Composition/framing: wide scene showing the full forest clearing, mid-distance view capturing both the musicians and the magical background
Lighting/mood: bright cheerful daylight, warm and inviting atmosphere, magical fairy-tale glow
Color palette: vibrant and cheerful — bright greens, warm browns, rainbow spectrum, soft pastels for mushroom houses, sunny yellow accents
Materials/textures: soft painterly textures, smooth gradients, friendly rounded edges, gentle watercolor washes
Constraints: keep all animals cute and child-friendly, maintain bright and happy mood throughout
Avoid: realistic proportions, dark or scary elements, photorealistic rendering, complex detailed backgrounds that compete with characters
